name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA (Miami Beach)
description_short: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM operates a cryptocurrency kiosk at Check Cashing USA in Miami Beach, allowing customers to buy Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies with cash quickly and conveniently.
description_long:
CoinFlip is a cryptocurrency ATM operator that maintains a physical kiosk location at Check Cashing USA on Washington Avenue in Miami Beach, Florida. The company specializes in providing cash-to-crypto conversion services through their Bitcoin ATM network across the United States. This particular location serves the Miami Beach area as part of a larger network of CoinFlip ATMs positioned in convenience stores, smoke shops, check cashing facilities, and other retail locations.

The Miami Beach CoinFlip ATM allows customers to purchase Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies using cash as payment. Customers can transact up to $15,000 per day with a CoinFlip Account (limits may vary by location). The service is designed for speed and convenience, requiring customers to have a crypto wallet before transacting. CoinFlip offers a mobile crypto wallet app that customers can download to create their wallet prior to visiting the ATM. The location operates seven days a week with extended hours, including Friday until 8:00 PM and weekend availability.

CoinFlip distinguishes itself through its distributed network of ATM locations embedded in existing retail businesses rather than standalone kiosks, making cryptocurrency purchasing accessible in neighborhood locations. The company provides 24/7 customer support via phone and email, offers a web-based account system to streamline repeat visits, and maintains a dedicated crypto wallet application. They also provide educational content including blog posts on cryptocurrency topics and frequently asked questions to help first-time and repeat users navigate the purchasing process.

CoinFlip's service appeals primarily to cash-holding individuals interested in acquiring cryptocurrency without using traditional banking intermediaries or online exchanges. However, users should be aware this is a transactional service with associated fees, not a financial advisory platform. The fees structure and specific coin availability are not detailed on this particular location's page. The service requires customers to have prior cryptocurrency wallet knowledge or be willing to learn the setup process.
pros: Extended hours of operation (9 AM–7 PM weekdays, until 8 PM Friday, 11 AM–4 PM Sunday) for weekday and weekend access
High daily transaction limits ($15,000 per day with CoinFlip Account, though limits may vary by location)
24/7 customer support available via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email (support@coinflip.tech)
CoinFlip Account system allows customers to save time and manage transactions online
Embedded in established Check Cashing USA location, providing physical retail presence and legitimacy
Free downloadable CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app for setting up wallet before transacting
Multiple nearby CoinFlip ATM locations throughout Miami and Miami Beach area for network convenience
cons: Fees structure and exact percentages not disclosed on the location page
Specific cryptocurrencies available for purchase not listed; only vague reference to 'Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies'
Requires customers to download and set up external crypto wallet app before first transaction, adding friction
No information about transaction time to receive purchased Bitcoin after purchase
Dependent on Check Cashing USA store hours; no standalone 24-hour access despite 24/7 customer support availability
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who prefer cash-based cryptocurrency purchases without online exchange accounts
Miami Beach residents and visitors seeking convenient neighborhood access to buy Bitcoin with cash
Cryptocurrency-familiar users already holding personal wallets and seeking cash-to-crypto conversion
Repeat customers who can benefit from the CoinFlip Account system for higher daily transaction limits
diagnosis: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM is best for cash-holding cryptocurrency buyers in the Miami Beach area who want to avoid traditional online exchanges and have existing wallet knowledge or willingness to learn. The main caveat is that fees, specific available cryptocurrencies, and exact settlement timelines are not transparent on this location's webpage, requiring customers to contact support or review terms separately before transacting.
services: Other cryptocurrency purchase with cash (specific coins not listed)
CoinFlip Account creation and management for increased transaction limits
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app download and setup
Cash-to-crypto conversion at point-of-sale ATM kiosk
Nearby ATM location information and directions
Educational blog content on cryptocurrency topics
